title: Linda Robertson
compiled_truth: Linda Robertson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-11-01 to 2002-01-11), Linda Robertson sent 123 and received 2141 emails, totalling 2264 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (97), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (43), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (28), [J  Kean](people/j-kean) (21), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (18). Mailbox folders observed: 2002_budget, _americas, cftc, compliments, deleted_items, enron_litigation.
